config.mace_attack_assistance.option.bre: Breach - Limited To Players And Hostile Mobs
config.mace_attack_assistance.option.dis: Changes Are Displayed In The Action Bar
config.mace_attack_assistance.option.dou: Double Tap - Auto Left Button Click (for Spear)
config.mace_attack_assistance.option.hid: Hide the Marker When Auto Aim is Off
config.mace_attack_assistance.option.in_: Charge Jump - In Use Elytra Jump Mode
config.mace_attack_assistance.option.jum: Jump Spam - Use the [Sprint or Sneak] key in combination
config.mace_attack_assistance.option.not: Charge Jump - Not In Use Elytra Jump Mode
config.mace_attack_assistance.option.ret: Return To PrevSlot After Breach Swap
config.mace_attack_assistance.option.roc: Rocket - Execute Even When An Empty Slot Is Selected
config.mace_attack_assistance.option.too:
While flying, press the sprint key.
This will adjust your direction horizontally only.
If a Stun Slam is predicted to fail, the system will automatically select a mace.
Automatically locks swing when swing control is disabled and target is close range.

When attacking while holding a non-weapon item, automatically switch to your weapon.
Searches the hotbar from left to right and selects the first weapon it finds.
If you delete the string, the entire drop-down menu will be displayed.

Attack directly while flying, then take off your elytra
 and attack again with primary mace.

If you select a spear and hold down the right mouse button,
 the attack button will be clicked automatically.

It's a single attack, but it increases the hit probability.
This does not affect the double tap of Charge Spear and Mace.
If the flight state changes twice within the threshold ticks, the jump will be suppressed for the set number of ticks.

Action when the distance to the target is close.
ON: Forces the camera to move.
OFF: Gentle camera movement only.
It does not affect legacy mode.
(Horizontal) Detection range 9 -> 90° (±45°)
This also affects the detection range of Aim(Elytra/Spear).
Limits FOV effects when holding a wind charge.
(Vertical) Detection range 9 -> 90° (±45°)

Direct attacks can be cancelled, but attacks using Sweeping Attacks cannot be prevented.
Add [Sprint + Key]
Remove [Sneak + Key]
default key is [T]
Modern allows you to jump higher.
When performing a Stun Slam, holding down the sprint key will select a mace instead of an axe.

When Y-velocity is greater than or equal to 0 and less than or equal to value, jump spam is not performed.
(value * 0.1)
[jump + sprint] will enable jump spam.

Your line of sight will not move until the target is within attack range.
This aim mode was used in ver 1.x.

If composite keys are enabled, this restriction is bypassed.
It will not spam until the player is at least two blocks higher.
This will reduce unnecessary spamming, but will result in a slightly lower altitude.
Drawing position of the marker. Affects all marker types.
If you have MSS1.5 or later installed, you can select the MSS weapon selector.
In Legacy, you jump low.

[Auto aim] on: Auto Aim Target
[Auto aim] off: Nearest Target
It will throw at the set angle regardless of the angle you are facing.
Adjust the camera before throwing the Wind Charge.
Added delay to the timing of throwing Wind Charge.

If the player is facing upwards above the angle they have set, the throw will be directed towards the set angle.
In Minecraft, directly downwards is 90 degrees.

Auto: Press the key to throw an Ender Pearl and a Wind Charge.
Manual: Press the key to throw an Ender Pearl, and then press it again during the cooldown to throw a Wind Charge.

If the player is facing a lower angle than the angle they have set, the projectile will be thrown in the direction they set.
In Minecraft, directly above is -90 degrees.
Prioritized when held in off-hand

[Attack + Jump] + [Sneak]
End recon without changing line of sight
[Attack + Jump] + [Use]
End recon and use item without changing line of sight.
Holding a Rocket or Rocket Blitz:On would be good.
Zoom in by holding the attack button while in Recon mode.
Target detection rectangle, distance below the player.
Rectangle for detecting targets, horizontal distance from player.
Interval determines how often entities are evaluated.
Target detection rectangle, distance above the player.

Return to the slot at the start of the attack.
If off, keeps last used weapon.

Uses breach when target and player are in the air.
Threshold can be adjusted.

Exact : 0 - Tolerant : 500
The level at which the difference in falling speed between you and the target is determined.
At 0, the player's falling speed must be strictly slower than the target.
At 500, the allowable speed difference is increased.
The higher the value, the more opportunities there are for snapback.
Inverts the swing setting while the key is held down.
When Beam or Spiral, the marker will always be displayed regardless of aim settings and flight state.
ON - Recommended
